nameOverride.description: Override the name of the chart

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified app name

routes.description: List of reverse proxy routes to create

name.description: Unique name for this route; used in generated Kubernetes resource names

host.description: Public hostname matched by the IngressRoute rule (e.g. app.example.com)

port.description: Port on the backend to forward traffic to

ip.description: Backend IPv4 address. Mutually exclusive with externalName. Generates a ClusterIP Service and EndpointSlice.

externalName.description: Backend hostname. Mutually exclusive with ip. Generates an ExternalName Service.

middlewares.description: Traefik Middleware references to attach to this route

backend.description: Options for connecting to the backend

scheme.description: Force a specific scheme when connecting to the backend.

insecureSkipVerify.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for the backend. Creates a ServersTransport resource.

caSecret.description: Name of a Secret containing ca.crt for backend TLS verification. Creates a ServersTransport resource.

host.description: Override the Host header sent to the backend. Creates a headers Middleware.
